title: Bamboo to Candy Cane
description: Changes bamboo to candy cane. Happy Christmas!
body:
## Bamboo to Candy Cane
**Does not need any mods for working!**
![Bamboo to Candy Cane main picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0af89f275633765619aaf365358420b4fa43e95e.png)
Texture Pack changes Bamboo to Candy Cane

Also changed:
- Bamboo model and texture (Age 0 and 1)
- Bamboo item
- Bamboo sapling
- Potted bamboo
  
### I also take commissions
**(If you interested — write me on Discord, @danieyas)**  
![Comissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba398d449c5417225c910e3a4c2919de39354236.png)
